**How I tested it**
<!-- e.g. `just check`, ran the UI, exercised the engine path -->

**Checklist**
- [ ] `just check` passes (fmt + clippy `-D warnings` + tests)
- [ ] Frontend JS (if touched) passes `node --check crates/sluice-ui/frontend/main.js`
- [ ] Engine changes (if any) built (`just engine-build`) — note: needs nightly + bpf-linker
- [ ] No secrets, PII, or third-party product names added
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if user-facing
